relations.note: Both define the same 'YOU DESERVE MORE' headline device (type + color).
Layout stacking applies to the same typographically-locked headline.
Hero headline layout is the visual container for the verbatim lockup copy.

quotes: Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).

rules.intent: Preserve the signature typographic identity of the campaign headline lockup across surfaces.
rules.rule_text: The 'YOU DESERVE MORE' campaign headline is always set in Agenda (campaign_headline.font, digital live text only; email fallback uses Nunito Sans ExtraBold) and rendered in ALL CAPS (campaign_headline.case = all_caps), with no exceptions.

quotes: Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue**
The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color
Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).

rules.intent: Encode a hidden disease-awareness cue into the headline color treatment while limiting palette choices to two approved options.
rules.rule_text: The campaign headline uses one of two approved colorways — Gold/Sunshine (#faa31b) or Brand Blue (#00529b) — and the letters 'D' (in DESERVE) and 'M' (in MORE) are always tinted to approximately 40% of that headline color (campaign_headline.letter_tint = 40%), a deliberate symbolic reference to the 'd' and 'm' of dermatomyositis.

quotes: Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.

rules.intent: Lock the hero presentation of the campaign lockup for visual consistency.
rules.rule_text: In hero placements, the campaign headline stacks as three left-aligned lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE).

effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.
Full lockup copy: "**YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

governance.preferred_form: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

rules.intent: Protect the MLR-approved product positioning claim from paraphrase or alteration.
rules.rule_text: The full campaign lockup copy — 'YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.' — must be used verbatim wherever the complete lockup is presented.
